notable_excerpts: A Europe-based global food major selected HCLTech to design and implement a greenfield IT setup and build an AI powered digital foundation.
Within HCLTech 38,000-plus additional employees have been trained on GenAI and 600-plus on responsible AI.
I'm happy to share we have been included in Forbes list of world's best employers for the sixth year in a row.
HCLTech's Data and AI division, Actian, is seeing increased demand for its metadata management, data catalogue and data governance solutions.
In AI Advisory, we signed several significant engagements this quarter and also joined the AI Verify Foundation, reinforcing our commitment to trustworthy AI.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call focused heavily on AI and digital transformation initiatives, with limited discussion on environmental sustainability. Social aspects were highlighted through employee training and recognition as a top employer. Governance was addressed through data governance and AI ethics commitments.
strengths: Strong focus on AI talent development
